hero.title: Ignite Your Marketing
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one AI-powered marketing platform that creates content, manages campaigns, optimizes ads, and drives growth — so you can focus on what matters most.

features.title: Everything You Need to
features.subtitle: Six powerful modules working together to transform your marketing from guesswork into a data-driven growth engine.

content_engine.title: Content Engine
content_engine.description: Generate blog posts, social captions, email copy, and landing pages in seconds. Our AI understands your brand voice and creates content that converts.

creative_studio.title: Creative Studio
creative_studio.description: Design stunning visuals, banners, and social media graphics without a designer. AI-powered templates that match your brand identity perfectly.

ads_orchestrator.title: Ads Orchestrator
ads_orchestrator.description: Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns across Google, Meta, TikTok, and more from a single dashboard. AI auto-optimizes for maximum ROAS.

seo_intelligence.title: SEO Intelligence
seo_intelligence.description: Dominate search rankings with AI-driven keyword research, content optimization, technical audits, and competitor analysis — all automated.

social_media.title: Social Media Hub
social_media.description: Schedule, publish, and analyze posts across all platforms. AI suggests the best times, hashtags, and content formats for maximum engagement.

lead_crm.title: Lead CRM
lead_crm.description: Capture, score, and nurture leads automatically. AI identifies your hottest prospects and triggers personalized outreach at the perfect moment.

how_it_works.title: How It
how_it_works.subtitle: Get started in minutes, not months. Three simple steps to transform your marketing.

step1.title: Connect
step1.description: Link your existing marketing channels, social accounts, and ad platforms. Ignify syncs everything in minutes and analyzes your current performance.

step2.title: Create
step2.description: Let AI generate optimized content, creatives, and campaigns tailored to your audience. Review, tweak, and approve — or let autopilot handle it all.

step3.title: Grow
step3.description: Watch your metrics soar as AI continuously optimizes every campaign, piece of content, and ad dollar. Real-time analytics show you exactly what's working.

testimonials.title: Loved by
testimonials.subtitle: See how businesses like yours are achieving incredible results with Ignify.

pricing_page.title: Simple, Transparent
pricing_page.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small businesses and solopreneurs getting started with AI marketing.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For growing businesses that need the full power of AI-driven marketing.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations needing custom solutions, dedicated support, and enterprise security.

faq.q1: Can I switch plans at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle, and we'll prorate any differences.
faq.q2: What happens after the free trial?
faq.a2: After your 14-day free trial, you'll be asked to choose a plan. If you don't select one, your account will be paused (not deleted) — you can reactivate anytime.
faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team for a full refund.
faq.q4: Can I use Ignify for multiple brands?
faq.a4: Yes! The Professional plan supports multiple brand profiles, and the Enterprise plan offers unlimited brand management with separate workspaces.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans. Enterprise customers can also pay via invoice.
faq.a6: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption, are SOC 2 Type II certified, and comply with GDPR and CCPA. Your data is never used to train our AI models.

about_page.title: About
about_page.subtitle: We're on a mission to democratize marketing intelligence and make world-class marketing accessible to every business.
about_page.story_p1: Ignify was born from a simple observation: marketing has become impossibly complex. Small and mid-sized businesses are expected to master SEO, social media, paid ads, email marketing, content creation, and CRM — all while actually running their business.
about_page.story_p2: We built Ignify to change that. By combining cutting-edge AI with an intuitive platform, we've created a marketing co-pilot that handles the complexity so businesses can focus on what they do best — serving their customers and growing their vision.
about_page.story_p3: Since our founding, we've helped over 500 businesses transform their marketing, generating millions of content pieces and managing billions in ad spend. But we're just getting started.
about_page.mission_text: To empower every business with AI-driven marketing tools that level the playing field, turning marketing from a bottleneck into a growth engine.
about_page.vision_text: A world where every business, regardless of size or budget, has access to the same marketing intelligence as the biggest brands on the planet.

innovation.title: Relentless Innovation
innovation.description: We push the boundaries of what AI can do for marketing. Every week, we ship improvements that make our customers more successful.

simplicity.title: Radical Simplicity
simplicity.description: Powerful doesn't have to mean complicated. We obsess over making complex marketing tasks feel effortless and intuitive.

transparency.title: Total Transparency
transparency.description: No hidden fees, no black-box algorithms. We show you exactly how our AI works and why it makes the recommendations it does.

customer.title: Customer Obsession
customer.description: Every feature we build, every decision we make starts with one question: will this help our customers grow faster?

about_page.team_subtitle: A passionate team of marketers, engineers, and AI researchers united by a single goal: making your marketing brilliant.

contact_page.title: Get In
contact_page.subtitle: Have a question, need a demo, or want to explore how Ignify can transform your marketing? We'd love to hear from you.
contact_page.message_placeholder: Tell us about your marketing goals and how we can help...
contact_page.demo_text: See Ignify in action with a personalized walkthrough. Our team will show you exactly how Ignify can work for your business.

footer.description: The AI-powered marketing platform that helps businesses create, optimize, and scale their marketing effortlessly.
